title: Simple Magnets
description: Adds easy-to-use magnet items and blocks to make gathering dropped items easier. Upgrade your magnet to make it reach further out.
body:
[![requires_framework](https://api.lpsmods.dev/data/framework.png)](https://mrcrayfish.com/mods/framework)

Adds simple magnet items and blocks to make gathering dropped items easier. Upgrade your magnet to make it reach further out. Use the magnet blocks to gather items from your mob farm instead of using tons of hoppers!

## Loaders

- [Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/simple-magnets)
- **Fabric**
- **Forge**
- *NeoForge**

## How to use

### Item

1. Right click the magnet item to teleport all nearby items to you.
2. Note that there will be a delay until you can next use the magnet item.

### Block

1. When powered it will teleport all nearby items to the block that the metal part faces.
2. Note that depending on the tier of the magnet block there will be a delay before it is unpowered.

## Block List

- Iron Magnet
- Gold Magnet
- Copper Magnet
- Diamond Magnet
- Netherite Magnet
- Iron Magnet Block
- Gold Magnet Block
- Copper Magnet Block
- Diamond Magnet Block
- Netherite Magnet Block

## FAQ

### Can I add this to my mod pack?

Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?

I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.

## Maven

```gradle
dependencies {
    modImplementation "maven.modrinth:magnets:fabric-${project.magnets_version}"
}
```
[More Information](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/tutorials/maven/)
